title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Kalyan Jewellers in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
